items.text: GCAS_Monitor_impl shall define vertical acceleration as 100.0

items.text: GCAS_Monitor_impl shall define expected impact time as 15.0

items.text: GCAS_Monitor_impl shall define recovery time as 5.0

items.text: GCAS_Monitor_impl shall calculate altitudeFromGround by invoking Agree_Nodes::height with altitude, verticalVelocity, and 0.5

items.text: When altitude <= 30.0 or altitudeFromGround <= 500.0, then gcasRequested = true
